nasb.text: Go up to the top of Pisgah and lift up your eyes to the west and north and south and east, and see it with your eyes, for you shall not cross over this Jordan.

esv.text: Go up to the top of Pisgah and lift up your eyes westward and northward and southward and eastward, and look at it with your eyes, for you shall not go over this Jordan.

cnv.text: 你要上毘斯迦山頂去，舉目向東、南、西、北，親眼觀看，因為你不能過這約旦河。

ccb.text: 你可以上毗斯迦山顶，向东南西北眺望，但你不可过约旦河。
